[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Riskin''' was a three foot tall dwarf [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] who was commanding officer of [[Advance Base Baskarn]]. He was short, but respected by most [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] for his tactical sense and sharp tongue. He had wrinkled features and a strip of white hair running down the middle of his head. Riskin was gruff, obnoxious, demanding, but at the same time very lovable. He had a humorous take to his own posture, making fun of the height of people who were taller than him.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Way of the Yrashu}} {{1st}}
